description: Top 30 entities with refs for instant context recovery
Historical issues + solutions linked to entities

\"noVNC showing directory listing instea.problem: "noVNC showing directory listing instead of vnc.html"
\"noVNC showing directory listing instea.solution: "Use novnc_proxy script instead of websockify directly"

\"Container restart failing with X1-lock.solution: "Use docker compose down/up instead of restart"

\"PyQt6 not compatible with Windows\".solution: "Converted all imports to PyQt5 (exec_() → exec(), enum changes)"
